index.title: Elemento | The Metacloud Control Plane for Sovereign Infrastructure
index.description: Elemento is the Metacloud: a sovereign control plane to govern, orchestrate and optimise public clouds, private clouds, hypervisors, sovereign providers and native AtomOS infrastructure.
